texto: Life is all but a dream we will soon wake up to and be 7 years old again
explicacao: Citação de Kira Jeffries sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Life is all but a dream we will soon wake up to and be 7 years old again” articula motivacao, age, vida em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como vida.

texto: There's always that song that brings you back to the past. That makes you pause in the middle of what you're doing just so you could hear it clearly. The words bringing you back to a time that seemed nearly impossible, the words making you think for one moment that time itself has actually stopped. And there's nothing but you & perfect melody that brings you one step closer to what used to be.

frase_original: There's always that song that brings you back to the past. That makes you pause in the middle of what you're doing just so you could hear it clearly. The words bringing you back to a time that seemed nearly impossible, the words making you think for one moment that time itself has actually stopped. And there's nothing but you & perfect melody that brings you one step closer to what used to be.
